query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "3Cloud, LLC". The company's official website domain is 3cloudsolutions.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
### Executive Summary
3Cloud, LLC is a specialized Microsoft Azure consulting firm headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, generating approximately $252.1 million in annual revenue. Following a period of rapid expansion backed by Gryphon Investors, the company was acquired by IT services giant Cognizant effective January 1, 2026. 3Cloud provides dedicated Azure services—including Data & AI, Cloud Platform, and Managed Services—to a client base that includes 10% of the Fortune 500.

### Company Overview & Leadership
3Cloud was founded in 2016 by former Microsoft executives Mike Rocco, who serves as CEO, and Jim Dietrich, who serves as President [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/), [Cognizant acquires 3Cloud to boost global Azure expertise](https://www.verdict.co.uk/cognizant-acquires-3cloud/). The company is headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, and operates across at least six different locations [3Cloud - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/3cloud), [3Cloud - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/3cloud-llc/358305461). 

Other key leadership figures include:
*   **Boone Parnell**: Director & Solution Architect [Contact Ronaldo Guevara | Global Director, Consulting Operations Delivery Center at 3Cloud - ZoomInfo](https://www.zoominfo.com/p/Ronaldo-Guevara/-1491302830)
*   **R. Michael Querimit**: Director, Solution Application Development [Contact Ronaldo Guevara | Global Director, Consulting Operations Delivery Center at 3Cloud - ZoomInfo](https://www.zoominfo.com/p/Ronaldo-Guevara/-1491302830)
*   **Ronaldo C. Guevara**: Global Senior Manager, Delivery Center [Contact Ronaldo Guevara | Global Director, Consulting Operations Delivery Center at 3Cloud - ZoomInfo](https://www.zoominfo.com/p/Ronaldo-Guevara/-1491302830)

The company reports an annual revenue of $252.1 million [3Cloud - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/3cloud-llc/358305461). Estimates of 3Cloud's total workforce vary; the company directly claims to employ over 700 Azure experts and engineers, while business databases estimate between 1,000 and 5,000 total employees [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/), [3Cloud - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/3cloud-llc/358305461). Recent acquisition data indicates the company brought approximately 1,200 employees (roughly 700 based in the U.S.) to its new parent company [Cognizant acquires 3Cloud to boost global Azure expertise](https://www.verdict.co.uk/cognizant-acquires-3cloud/).

### Corporate Structure & M&A Activity
3Cloud has undergone significant corporate restructuring and aggressive M&A activity since 2020:

*   **Private Equity Backing (2020-2025)**: In June 2020, middle-market private equity firm Gryphon Investors completed a majority investment in 3Cloud valued at approximately $250 million [Gryphon Investors Announces Majority Investment in 3Cloud | Gryphon Investors](https://www.gryphon-inv.com/news/gryphon-investors-announces-majority-investment-in-3cloud/), [3Cloud | HashiCorp Tech Partner](https://www.hashicorp.com/en/partners/systems-integrators/3cloud). The founders and management team retained significant equity [Gryphon Investors Majority Investment in 3Cloud | PrivSource](https://www.privsource.com/acquisitions/deal/gryphon-investors-majority-investment-in-3cloud-krS8wr).
*   **Add-on Acquisitions**: Under Gryphon's ownership, 3Cloud executed multiple acquisitions to expand its capabilities, including Applied Cloud Systems (August 2020), Pragmatic Works, CCG Analytics, BlueGranite, Polaris Solutions, Brainspire Solutions, and DesignMind [3Cloud Acquires DesignMind, Focusing on Expanding Data & AI Investments - 3Cloud](https://3cloudsolutions.com/resources/3cloud-acquires-designmind/), [Applied Cloud Systems (Now 3Cloud Solutions) | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/applied-cloud-systems).
*   **Growth Metrics**: During Gryphon's five-year hold period, 3Cloud achieved an average annual organic growth rate of over 20% and increased its total revenue by more than 12x [Cognizant acquires 3Cloud to boost global Azure expertise](https://www.verdict.co.uk/cognizant-acquires-3cloud/), [Gryphon Investors to Sell 3Cloud to Cognizant | Gryphon Investors](https://www.gryphon-inv.com/news/gryphon-investors-to-sell-3cloud-to-cognizant/).
*   **Acquisition by Cognizant (2026)**: Following a definitive agreement announced in November 2025, Cognizant finalized its acquisition of 3Cloud effective January 1, 2026 [Cognizant completes 3Cloud acquisition, creates Azure AI powerhouse - Outsource Accelerator](https://news.outsourceaccelerator.com/cognizant-completes-3cloud-acquisition/). Financial terms were not disclosed [Cognizant to Acquire 3Cloud](https://www.consultingmag.com/2025/11/19/cognizant-to-acquire-3cloud/). Lazard and Kirkland & Ellis advised Gryphon Investors, while Mayer Brown advised Cognizant [Gryphon Completes 3Cloud Sale to Cognizant](https://www.themiddlemarket.com/latest-news/cognizant-completes-acquisition-of-3cloud-from-gryphon-investors), [Cognizant acquires 3Cloud to boost global Azure expertise - aster.cloud](https://aster.cloud/2026/01/08/cognizant-acquires-3cloud-to-boost-global-azure-expertise/).

### Core Services & Market Position
3Cloud operates as a 100% Azure-dedicated Microsoft Gold-certified partner and an Azure Expert Managed Services Provider [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/), [3Cloud - Services & Company Info](https://clutch.co/profile/3cloud). The firm leverages its founders' deep network within Microsoft engineering and field leadership to deliver specialized services [3Cloud - Services & Company Info](https://clutch.co/profile/3cloud). 

**Core Offerings:**
*   Data, Analytics & AI
*   Cloud Platform & Infrastructure
*   Cloud Application Development / App Innovation
*   DevOps & Automation
*   Managed Services [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/), [3Cloud - Services & Company Info](https://clutch.co/profile/3cloud)

The company has completed over 1,600 Azure engagements and counts 1 in 10 Fortune 500 companies among its clients [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/). Beyond Microsoft, 3Cloud maintains strategic partnerships with Databricks, Intel, Nerdio, Tegria, VMware, and AMD [About 3Cloud - Azure Consulting Partners](https://3cloudsolutions.com/about-us/).

### Market Sentiment & Reviews
Market sentiment indicates that 3Cloud is highly effective for organizations heavily invested in the Microsoft ecosystem, though its specialized nature is a double-edged sword. 

*   **Ratings**: 3Cloud holds a 3.5-star rating on G2, though this is based on a limited sample size of 1 verified review [3Cloud Solutions Products | Read 1 Reviews on G2](https://www.g2.com/sellers/3cloud-solutions). 
*   **Strengths**: Clients report that 3Cloud successfully delivers cost-optimized cloud solutions for migrating from on-premises servers, which has driven revenue growth and reduced costs through improved mission-critical processes [3Cloud Reviews 2026: Details, Pricing, & Features | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/3cloud/reviews), [3Cloud Solutions Products | Read 1 Reviews on G2](https://www.g2.com/sellers/3cloud-solutions). The firm has notable traction in the Hospital & Health Care industry [Top 10 3Cloud Alternatives & Competitors in 2025 | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/3cloud/competitors/alternatives).
*   **Limitations**: Reviewers note that 3Cloud's solutions are strictly limited to Azure technologies, making the firm unsuitable for multi-cloud or non-Azure environments [3Cloud Reviews 2026: Details, Pricing, & Features | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/3cloud/reviews).
*   **Competitors**: G2 identifies Western Computer as the best overall alternative in the Microsoft Consulting Services category. Other common alternatives include Coastal Cloud, Switchfast Technologies, and Alta Vista Technology [Top 10 3Cloud Alternatives & Competitors in 2025 | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/3cloud/competitors/alternatives), [Top 10 3Cloud Solutions Alternatives 2022 | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/3cloud-solutions/competitors/alternatives/small-business).

### Industry Classifications
3Cloud LLC is tracked under the following primary industry classification codes:
*   **NAICS Codes**: 541512 (Computer Systems Design Services), 54151, 5415, 5112, 511, 541, 54, 51 [3Cloud Information - RocketReach](https://rocketreach.co/3cloud-profile_b52e0f9cf82c99a9), [3Cloud - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/3cloud-llc/358305461).
*   **SIC Codes**: 737 (Computer Programming, Data Processing, And Other Computer Related Services), 73 [3Cloud Information - RocketReach](https://rocketreach.co/3cloud-profile_b52e0f9cf82c99a9), [3Cloud - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/3cloud-llc/358305461).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Missing Industry Codes**: No UNSPSC or ISIC codes were available in the provided data.
*   **Financial Details**: The exact purchase price and financial terms of the January 2026 acquisition by Cognizant were not disclosed in the findings.
*   **Review Volume**: Customer sentiment analysis is limited by a very low volume of verified reviews (only 1 review cited from G2).
